# Scenario: Telegram Agent Bridge

Set up this repository so resident coding agents work according to the Agent Engineering Manifesto.

Constraints:

- this repo is more integration-heavy than the minimal service fixture;
- the result should acknowledge Telegram bot flow, agent bridge boundaries, and validation expectations;
- keep the docs lean and specific;
- create factual maps only if they genuinely clarify ownership or integration risk.

Expected output shape:

- a project-specific `AGENTS.md`;
- docs that help future agents understand the repo without guessing ownership;
- validation guidance that matches integration-heavy work.
